data.title: Add runtime awareness to red-test-evaluator and update verdict contract
data.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes with no regressions
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Runtime budget check section in red-test-evaluator.md with REVISE on >10s and backward-compat handling
  Verify: covered by Task 3 eval (GREEN)
- [ ] Verdict contract updated with runtime-aware behavior and absent-field handling
  Verify: grep -q "ESTIMATED_RUNTIME" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md
- [ ] No existing test fixtures in tests/ require update
  Verify: ! grep -rq "VERDICT:REVISE\|VERDICT:REJECT\|VERDICT:CONFIRM" tests/ || echo "Existing fixtures found — verify they tolerate new runtime fields"
- [ ] Eval from Task 3 (ee77-d95c) now passes (GREEN)
  Verify: manual — run eval, confirm passes

## TDD Role
GREEN phase — Task 3 eval (ee77-d95c) is the RED test. This task makes it pass.

## Covers
SC5

## Files
- Edit: plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md
- Edit: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md
